title: Phyllomphax affinis
taxonomy: Phyllomphax affinis is a species of plant within the family Euphorbiaceae. It is native to Madagascar and is classified as an evergreen shrub. The classification of Phyllomphax affinis is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Malpighiales, family Euphorbiaceae, genus Phyllomphax, and species P. affinis. This classification reflects its unique characteristics and relationships to other plants. The classification of Phyllomphax affinis provides essential information for further study and research on the plant.
